name: No witnesses to my firm's AI invisibility—how to prove need?

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my firm's AI invisibility—how to prove need?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Self-audit: query AI for your practice/city; zero mentions confirm issue.** Track competitor appearances as evidence. **Key factors:** 1) Direct tests; 2) Lead logs; 3) Directory gaps; 4) PR scans. Document weekly, share with partners. Proof is data-driven.[1][3]
